review_comment: Is this needed, given that EVP_CIPHER_CTX_get_block_size just calls EVP_CIPHER_get_block_size, which you've modified above to return 0 if cipher is NULL?  It doesn't hurt anything of course, its just an extra check of the same data.
Yes, it is needed since my last commit reverts the initial change I made to `EVP_CIPHER_get_block_size()` (as per the suggestion from Tomas and Matt).
